arts.ttl: Brighton boss Fabian Hurzeler admits Evan Ferguson may leave this month amid Arsenal interest
arts.sum: Evan Ferguson will be allowed to leave Brighton on loan in the January transfer window if it suits his development with Arsenal and West Ham in eager need of an attacking reinforcements

arts.ttl: Arsenal step up efforts to sign €70m forward on loan
arts.sum: Arsenal are stepping up efforts to sign a striker on loan this month and have approached Juventus over a deal for Dusan Vlahovic. Mikel Arteta has confirmed Arsenal are working on bringing in reinforcements before the deadline, after Gabriel Jesus was sidelined for the remainder of the campaign. arts.ttl: I cried when Arsene Wenger tried to keep me, I should’ve stayed at Arsenal
arts.sum: Former Arsenal star Alexander Hleb has been remarkably open in recent years about how much he regrets his decision to leave the Gunners and join Barcelona in 2008. arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Tottenham: Mikel Arteta must stop Spurs becoming "real legends" in North London derby
arts.sum: Arsenal must prevent Tottenham Hotspur from becoming "real legends" in Wednesday's Premier League North London derby, Ray Parlour tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have 'clear ideas' on transfers - Arteta
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has said that the club have "very clear ideas" on who they want to sign during the January transfer window as they struggle with an influx of injuries.
